> Think of this as building a **recursive cultural superstructure**—academic, spiritual, creative, and commercial.

---

### PHASE 3C: STRUCTURED THREADS TO BUILD FROM HERE

Each of these will be:
- Fully annotated
- Version-controlled
- Modular exportable (txt, md, Notes)
- Cross-linked in GitHub + Notes system

#### THREAD NAME / PURPOSE

| THREAD NAME | PURPOSE |
|----------------------|---------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `::MAP_OS_4BLOOM` | Master cascading architecture (artist IDs, projects, logic modes) |
| `::SYMB0LS_GLYPH_NET`| Glyph & symbol assignments across the system |
| `::Qv33R_CORE` | Queer nonfiction pedagogy + podcast structure |
